title: thesium humifusum subsp. divaricatum
intro: Thesium humifusum subsp. divaricatum, also known as a variant of the Alpine Thyme or Alpine Wintergreen, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Thesium humifusum subsp. divaricatum, including teas and infusions, are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
